# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "RemoteDevTeam-NSG",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Network Security Group for remote development team access"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Network Security Group"
      }
    },
    "environment": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Development",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Development",
        "Staging",
        "Production"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Environment tag for the NSG"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "sourceAddressPrefix": "0.0.0.0/0"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": {
        "Environment": "[parameters('environment')]",
        "Purpose": "Remote Development Team Access",
        "ManagedBy": "ARM Template"
      },
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-RDP-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow RDP access for remote development team to connect to Windows VMs",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "[variables('sourceAddressPrefix')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 100,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-SSH-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow SSH access for remote development team to connect to Linux VMs",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "[variables('sourceAddressPrefix')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 110,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTP-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTP access for web application testing and development",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "80",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "[variables('sourceAddressPrefix')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 120,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTPS-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTPS access for secure web application testing and development",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "443",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "[variables('sourceAddressPrefix')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 130,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Deny-All-Other-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Deny all other inbound traffic not explicitly allowed",
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "*",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Deny",
              "priority": 4096,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTP-Outbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow outbound HTTP traffic for package downloads and updates",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "80",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "[variables('sourceAddressPrefix')]",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 100,
              "direction": "Outbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTPS-Outbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow outbound HTTPS traffic for secure package downloads and API calls",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "443",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "[variables('sourceAddressPrefix')]",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 110,
              "direction": "Outbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "nsgId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Resource ID of the deployed Network Security Group"
      }
    },
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the deployed Network Security Group"
      }
    },
    "nsgLocation": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('location')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location of the deployed Network Security Group"
      }
    },
    "securityRulesSummary": {
      "type": "object",
      "value": {
        "inboundRules": {
          "RDP": "Port 3389 - Allowed from 0.0.0.0/0 (Priority 100)",
          "SSH": "Port 22 - Allowed from 0.0.0.0/0 (Priority 110)",
          "HTTP": "Port 80 - Allowed from 0.0.0.0/0 (Priority 120)",
          "HTTPS": "Port 443 - Allowed from 0.0.0.0/0 (Priority 130)",
          "DenyAllOther": "All other inbound traffic denied (Priority 4096)"
        },
        "outboundRules": {
          "HTTP": "Port 80 - Allowed to 0.0.0.0/0 (Priority 100)",
          "HTTPS": "Port 443 - Allowed to 0.0.0.0/0 (Priority 110)"
        }
      },
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Summary of all configured security rules"
      }
    }
  }
}
